name: testimonials
description: A testimonials section: an optional eyebrow, an h2 + subtitle, then a responsive grid of quote cards. Each card is a semantic figure — an optional star row, a blockquote and a figcaption with the author's avatar, name and role. Columns go 1 → 2 → 3. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion on mount and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The heading renders as an h2 that labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby, so it slots under a page h1 without breaking the heading order
Each testimonial is a figure/blockquote/figcaption, so assistive tech announces the quote together with its attribution
The author avatar is the ibirdui avatar primitive, exposed as a labelled image whether the photo loads or falls back to initials
The star rating is decorative (aria-hidden) but paired with a visually-hidden "Rated N out of 5" label, so it never relies on the icons alone
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a testimonials / social-proof section for a landing page
a grid of customer quote cards with avatars and ratings
a reviews section built on ibirdui
examples: <Testimonials title="Loved by product teams" testimonials={[{ quote: 'Shipped in a weekend.', author: { name: 'Ada Reyes', role: 'Head of Design' } }]} />
